title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) with the Los Baños Employees Multi- Purpose Cooperative (LOBEMCO) for Various Undertakings and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. ( AUTHOR : COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 11/29/2021)
